findings.message: User-provided token is sent in the request body directly without using a secure method.
findings.suggestion: Ensure that the token in the request body is encrypted or sent over a secure channel (e.g., HTTPS). Validate and sanitize the token before using it.

findings.message: No error handling for network or HTTP errors in the refreshToken function.
findings.suggestion: Add error handling to manage situations where the network request fails or the server returns an error status.
